column6: This crate owns measurements of the real public semantic-to-scene path; it explicitly does not own product algorithms, private shortcuts, or alternate implementations.
This crate owns the first external public-path consumer and bundled licensed font fixtures; it explicitly does not own product behavior or private implementation shortcuts.
This crate owns native showcase events, presentation, and live proof composition; it explicitly does not own document semantics, shaping, line formation, rasterization, or product APIs.
This crate owns the external TextScene-to-imaging adapter, poster composition, and deterministic CPU snapshot; it explicitly does not own core text behavior, renderer policy, or product APIs.
This crate owns private flow-trace-v0 checkpoint and virtual-extent experiments; it explicitly does not own production layout, product benchmarks, or public checkpoint formats.
This crate owns historical retained-Parley seam observations and conformance gaps; it explicitly does not own the production adapter, product benchmarks, or public prepared-text APIs.
This crate owns private identity-trace-v0 canonical-storage candidates and measurements; it explicitly does not own production storage, product benchmarks, or public position APIs.
This crate owns private text-data tier artifact and replay measurements; it explicitly does not own production providers, product benchmarks, or text-data APIs.
This crate owns Underwood's semantic-to-scene façade and private foundational modules; it explicitly does not own text shaping physics, host policy, or rendering.
This crate owns conversion between Underwood preparation contracts and pinned Parley; it explicitly does not own documents, flow, scenes, renderers, or public Parley leakage.
This crate owns repository policy validation; it explicitly does not own product behavior or architectural decisions.
